flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Roxbury Community College are 5% below 6-year earnings ($40.8k → $38.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Roxbury Community College rose 96% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 2.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Roxbury Community College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (49.0% → 54.9%).
